CVE-2024-1013.title: An out-of-bounds stack write flaw was found in unixODBC on 64-bit ...
CVE-2024-1013.description: An out-of-bounds stack write flaw was found in unixODBC on 64-bit architectures where the caller has 4 bytes and callee writes 8 bytes. This issue may go unnoticed on little-endian architectures, while big-endian architectures can be broken.
